ns0:entry.ns0:title: CJackHwang/ds2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CJackHwang/ds2api
Language: go
DeepSeek-Compatible Middleware Interface: A technical exploration project in Go, focusing on high-concurrency protocol adaptation. It serves as a reference implementation for converting diverse web protocols into standardized formats.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Gentleman-Programming/engram
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/engram
Language: go
Persistent memory system for AI coding agents. Agent-agnostic Go binary with SQLite + FTS5, MCP server, HTTP API, CLI, and TUI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumNous/new-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api
Language: go
A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TecharoHQ/anubis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TecharoHQ/anubis
Language: go
Weighs the soul of incoming HTTP requests to stop AI crawlers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tencent/WeKnora
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tencent/WeKnora
Language: go
Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alireza0/s-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alireza0/s-ui
Language: go
An advanced Web Panel • Built for SagerNet/Sing-Box

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chenhg5/cc-connect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chenhg5/cc-connect
Language: go
Bridge local AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) to messaging platforms (Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, Slack, Telegram, Discord, LINE, WeChat Work). Chat with your AI dev assistant from anywhere — no public IP required for most platforms.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/Fabric
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/Fabric
Language: go
Fabric is an open-source framework for augmenting humans using AI. It provides a modular system for solving specific problems using a crowdsourced set of AI prompts that can be used anywhere.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: everywall/ladder
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/everywall/ladder
Language: go
Selfhosted alternative to 12ft.io. and 1ft.io. Proxy to remove CORS headers and modify HTML

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gastownhall/beads
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gastownhall/beads
Language: go
Beads - A memory upgrade for your coding agent

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gastownhall/gascity
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gastownhall/gascity
Language: go
Orchestration-builder SDK for multi-agent coding workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: go-gitea/gitea
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea
Language: go
Git with a cup of tea! Painless self-hosted all-in-one software development service, including Git hosting, code review, team collaboration, package registry and CI/CD

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hatchet-dev/hatchet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hatchet-dev/hatchet
Language: go
🪓 An orchestration engine for background tasks, AI agents, and durable workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: knadh/listmonk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/knadh/listmonk
Language: go
High performance, self-hosted, newsletter and mailing list manager with a modern dashboard. Single binary app.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubescape/kubescape
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubescape/kubescape
Language: go
Kubescape is an open-source Kubernetes security platform for your IDE, CI/CD pipelines, and clusters. It includes risk analysis, security, compliance, and misconfiguration scanning, saving Kubernetes users and administrators precious time, effort, and resources.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
Language: go
Advanced DNS tunneling VPN for censorship bypass, optimized beyond DNSTT and SlipStream with low-overhead ARQ, resolver load balancing, high packet-loss stability and speed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/typescript-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go
Language: go
Staging repo for development of native port of TypeScript

ns0:entry.ns0:title: seaweedfs/seaweedfs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/seaweedfs/seaweedfs
Language: go
SeaweedFS is a distributed storage system for object storage (S3), file systems, and Iceberg tables, designed to handle billions of files with O(1) disk access and effortless horizontal scaling.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: woodpecker-ci/woodpecker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker
Language: go
Woodpecker is a simple, yet powerful CI/CD engine with great extensibility.
